target_version_rule: Use for v0.1.30 if v0.1.29 lands Windows distribution hardening; otherwise use for the first open asset-promotion slice after distribution hardening.

candidates.best_use: Wall-adjacent service-lift and hoist control dressing beside level transitions.
candidates.reason: Adds repeated steampunk route clarity across all current level transitions without changing collision, triggers, combat, or objective flow.
acceptance_gates: Metadata exists and records the selected promotion version plus exact placement role.
Root and child hierarchy expose backplate, lever, gauge, lamps, pipes, label, rivets, and grime roles.
Minimum detail counts pass for backplate, lever, gauge, lamps, pipes, label, fasteners, grime, and zero colliders.
No colliders, trigger volumes, NavMeshObstacle components, or new gameplay interaction components are present.
Placement stays wall-adjacent or lift-frame-adjacent and does not narrow route width, door clearance, combat lanes, or final-exit readability.
Route audit, level validation, and full V0 matrix pass after implementation.
validation_checks: Metadata component name, role, and promotion version
Required child roots or equivalent named parts
Renderer/material role keywords for iron, brass, enamel or gauge, lamp, pipe, rivet or bolt, grime or oil or scorch
Zero collider and zero trigger count
No new gameplay interaction components under the call-box hierarchy

candidates.best_use: Objective-key presentation pedestal around existing gear-key pickups.
candidates.reason: Improves objective readability, but sits closer to pickup trigger semantics than the selected lift call box.
acceptance_gates: Existing pickup remains visible and reachable.
No new pickup trigger ownership or route blocking.
Minimum parts include base, brass socket ring, label, fasteners, lamps, pipes, and zero colliders.

candidates.best_use: Wall-only gauge, sight-glass, label, and pipe-stub machinery dressing.
candidates.reason: Safest wall-only visual-density fallback if transition-adjacent call-box placement is delayed.
acceptance_gates: No colliders, triggers, route-state contradiction, or new gameplay components.
Must remain visually distinct from the existing wall-pipe gauge cluster.

selected_candidate.implementation_summary: Promote Unity-owned, no-collider lift/hoist call-box dressing in Level01 through Level05 with metadata, named hierarchy, material-role coverage, detail-count validation, route audit, full V0 matrix, package, release notes, and status-doc updates.
selected_candidate.fallback_if_blocked: Use BoilerInspectionPanelPrototype on noncritical walls in Level01, Level02, and Level03.

main_lane_verification: Run scene rebuild for the selected version.
Run route audit with no blockers.
Run level validation with ServiceLiftCallBoxPrototype checks.
Refresh candidate readiness and release notes if the slice packages a build.
